channel.title: Signified B Sides
channel.description: Signified B Sides is basically my rant space for content and topics that don't really fit into the main channel. Videos here will be even more unpolished and less scripted. I plan on doing addendums to the main videos as well as rants on topics that don't fully fit into the scope of the main channel. Ideally, eventually, I'll maybe have some commentary tracks and things like that.
channel.itunes:author: Signified B Sides
channel.itunes:subtitle: Signified B Sides
channel.itunes:summary: Signified B Sides is basically my rant space for content and topics that don't really fit into the main channel. Videos here will be even more unpolished and less scripted. I plan on doing addendums to the main videos as well as rants on topics that don't fully fit into the scope of the main channel. Ideally, eventually, I'll maybe have some commentary tracks and things like that.

item.title: Explaining the long road to a Million subs
item.description: I decided to keep this public since i heard that it may not stay up on twitch and I know some folks won't see it there.
item.itunes:author: Signified B Sides
item.itunes:subtitle: Explaining the long road to a Million subs
item.itunes:summary: I decided to keep this public since i heard that it may not stay up on twitch and I know some folks won't see it there.
